timestamp_source_text: Email date from Graziela Vedana on 2025-11-04
operator_shipment_context: Air freight shipment for cacao products
geographic_scope: Ilheus (SSA, Brazil) to San Francisco (SFO, USA)

cost_components.name: Export Customs Clearance
cost_components.notes: For the account of the shipper

cost_components.name: Invoice Line Items (US)
cost_components.details: First 3 line-items free, $5.00 per line thereafter

cost_components.name: Bond (if applicable)
cost_components.details: $6.00 per $1,000 of value plus duty, $100.00 minimum

cost_components.name: US Customs Inspection and Exams
cost_components.notes: At discretion of US Customs, non-negotiable

notes: Pricing for air freight is valid for 15 days only.
Reconfirm prices at the end of February for March shipments.
Ocean freight deemed significantly expensive due to infrastructure and distance to closest port.
Shipper may save costs by delivering directly to SSA airport with own contacts.
All shipments entering US commerce are subject to US Customs inspection and exams.
Surety Bond required for all customs entries; rates vary for cargo requiring clearance through other governmental agencies.
